name: Chloe |Fat punk|
description:
After a bit, I’m finally back and to making bots.

Sorry for wasting everyone’s time, I’ll be posting more new bots!

Currently however, I wanna take a break at making the Kipteitei “story” bots. It’s a bit exhausting and a bit stressful, I just hope you all understand

This character is actually based on a show called “life is strange”
creator: traffic_Conez
